svg.title: Lotus Blossom Brainstorming Diagram
svg.desc: A 9×9 lotus blossom grid: one core 3×3 in the center surrounded by 8 petal 3×3 grids. The center cell holds the main topic; 8 surrounding cells (A–H) each become the center of their own outer grid.
svg.text: 1. Write your topic in the dark center cell
2. Fill A–H in the core grid with 8 related sub-ideas
3. Each sub-idea (A–H) becomes the center of its own petal grid — add 8 more ideas in each
Result: up to 64 ideas from a single starting point
